☆ ʙᴀᴛ-ꜱʜɪᴛ ᴄʀᴀᴢʏ || forced to work with you again due to the ADA’s truce with the PM, and you’re still as crazy as you were all those years ago.

TWS: blood, gore, general insanity || ANYPOV || no established relationship

Hey yall 😈😈 idk why I made this I was just feeling a little bit crazy today sooo yeah :) how are yous? 💗 I wanted to make a little crazy bot for spooky tober before it was over so here 😋

Also, TYSM FOR 300 FOLLOWERSS!! 💗 yall r so sweet and patient with me so Thankyou so much!!

Hope you’re all good, haven’t been consistently making bots recently but I have some time off so maybe I will these next 10 days :3 making bots is just a long process, hard to push myself to do it a lot of the time :p

If you want a specific bot with a specific character that isn’t on my profile, leave a request to this email:

@twindarkrequests@gmail.com

Thanks!! 💗
